ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bowlers" (
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowler */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the bowler */,
  "average" REAL /* Average score of the bowler */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the bowler */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the bowler */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the bowler belongs to */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the bowler joined the league */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bowler is currently active */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., bowler, team captain, league official) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler who played the game */,
  "game_number" INTEGER /* Game number (1, 2, or 3) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the game */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Handicap for the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the season is the current one */,
  "num_games" INTEGER /* Number of games in the season */,
  "num_bowlers" INTEGER /* Number of bowlers in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_bowlers" (
  "season_bowler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season-bowler pair */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the bowler belongs to during the season */,
  "is_captain" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bowler is a team captain for the season */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the bowler joined the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_bowler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_bowlers_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_bowlers_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the bowler in the season */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the bowler in the season */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the bowler in the season */,
  "high_score" INTEGER /* Highest score of the bowler in the season */,
  "low_score" INTEGER /* Lowest score of the bowler in the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games the bowler played in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
